name: Lecron Industrial Development Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Lecron Industrial Development Group Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells chemical products. The company's products include monomer polyether polyol, system polyol for polyurethane foam, polyurethane prepolymer for elastomer, polyurea waterproof and anti-corrosion materials, medical intermediate, the third generation polycarboxylic acid water reducer monomer, surfactant, high boiling point solvent, polyurethane fireproof insulation panel, etc. Its products are used in various applications, including construction thermal insulation, pre-insulated pipes, sandwich panels, solar water heaters, household appliances, and automobiles. The company was formerly known as Lecron Internet Media Industry Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Lecron Industrial Development Group Co., Ltd. in July 2019. Lecron Industrial Development Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 2003 and is based in Zibo, China.
